meta.title: Classic Matte Black Shadow Box | Forge Frame | ShadowboxFrames.com
meta.description: Handcrafted matte black shadow box with standard depth. A timeless, versatile frame for displaying medals, keepsakes, and cherished mementos.

standard-depth-matte-black.inspirationSubtitle: The one that goes with everything
standard-depth-matte-black.designBodyParagraph: Our matte black finish absorbs light rather than reflecting it, which means all the attention stays on what's inside your shadow box. The smooth, non-reflective surface works in any room and alongside any decor style. No matter what color your walls are, this frame quietly fits in while letting your display take center stage. Each frame is handcrafted with clean lines and a subtle profile that feels intentional without being fussy.

standard-depth-bright-white.inspirationSubtitle: Clean, bright, and full of possibility
standard-depth-bright-white.designBodyParagraph: Bright white has a way of making colors sing. The clean finish on this shadow box amplifies whatever you display inside, from soft pastels to bold primaries. It's a natural fit for nurseries, bathrooms, sunlit hallways, and anywhere you want a fresh, uncluttered look. The profile is simple and understated -- no ornate details to compete with your keepsakes, just a clean border that frames the moment beautifully.

standard-depth-honey-oak.designBodyParagraph: The honey oak finish glows. There's no other way to say it. The golden undertones catch natural and artificial light alike, giving this frame a living, breathing quality that flat finishes can't match. Visible grain patterns add texture and depth, making each shadow box feel handpicked from the lumber yard. It's a warm, approachable frame that works beautifully in kitchens, dining rooms, and any space that values natural materials.

meta.title: Driftwood White Shadow Box | Shoreline Frame | ShadowboxFrames.com
meta.description: A beach-inspired whitewash shadow box with standard depth. Handcrafted with a soft, weathered finish for coastal and relaxed displays.

standard-depth-coastal-whitewash.inspirationSubtitle: Softly weathered, like a day at the shore
standard-depth-coastal-whitewash.designBodyParagraph: The whitewash technique lets the wood grain peek through a thin veil of soft white, creating a layered, textured look that feels relaxed and natural. It's not stark or polished -- it's the kind of finish that invites bare feet and open windows. The weathered quality gives each frame a lived-in warmth that's impossible to fake with solid paint. It works beautifully in beach houses, sunrooms, and any space that wants to feel a little more like vacation.

meta.title: Natural Wood Shadow Box | Oakmoss Frame | ShadowboxFrames.com
meta.description: A warm natural wood shadow box with visible grain and standard depth. Handcrafted to bring organic warmth to your keepsakes and displays.

standard-depth-natural-wood.designBodyParagraph: Every natural wood frame tells its own story through the grain. No two are exactly alike, which means your shadow box is as one-of-a-kind as the items inside it. The light, warm tone pairs beautifully with earthy displays -- dried botanicals, wooden keepsakes, travel souvenirs -- but it's equally at home with colorful collections. The finish is smooth and sealed to protect the wood while letting its natural beauty come through.

meta.description: A minimal modern white shadow box with clean lines and standard depth. Handcrafted for bright, curated displays in contemporary spaces.

standard-depth-modern-white.designBodyParagraph: The modern white finish combines the crispness of white with the sharpness of an angular profile. It's more structured than our standard bright white -- think Scandinavian design rather than cottage style. The frame practically disappears into light-colored walls, making it ideal for displays where you want the items inside to feel like they're floating. Clean, quiet, and intentional.

meta.title: Modern Black Shadow Box | Basalt Frame | ShadowboxFrames.com
meta.description: A sleek modern black shadow box with clean lines and standard depth. Handcrafted for contemporary spaces and curated displays.

standard-depth-modern-black.designBodyParagraph: What sets this modern profile apart from our classic matte black is the geometry. The lines are sharper, the profile is more angular, and the overall impression is more architectural. It's the kind of frame that looks intentional on a gallery wall or as part of a carefully arranged display grouping. The black finish is smooth and understated, letting the structure of the frame itself do the talking.

It's a frame that works in mid-century modern living rooms, cozy reading nooks, and sun-filled kitchens. The tone is rich without being dark, making it a versatile complement to both warm and cool color palettes.
